objective: Bridge the completed Remap-MMAPI operator capability toward a real EIS boundary question by testing whether a constrained local Remap correction can reduce a measurable local residual on a challenge/global-model-risk sample.

entry_context.project_positioning: Jetson Orin NX heterogeneous video compute and device-side dataflow optimization, with EIS as the representative workload.
entry_context.previous_operator_result: C++ Remap and Remap-MMAPI diagnostic paths work under known size/FOV boundaries.
entry_context.quality_anchor: resid_r15_s07 remains frozen for Regular-gate quality. This loop must not replace or degrade it.
entry_context.current_question: Can a small local Remap correction address one measurable global-warp boundary case, or is local warp not useful without a more complete mesh/RS/gyro model?

result.decision: Static single-cell local Remap correction did not improve the selected parallax/global-warp boundary. The route is classified as no useful quality gain from this simple local correction.
result.p5_p6_decision: Not triggered for implementation. CPU/OpenCV prototype did not show value, so VPI C++ Remap and Remap-MMAPI local correction were not pursued for this map.
result.claim_boundary: Negative diagnostic quality bridge result only. Remap operator remains valuable, but this static local correction does not solve parallax/local EIS quality.

frozen_boundaries: Do not tune global affine/rigid EIS parameters.
Do not alter the accepted Regular-gate quality anchor.
Use one chosen diagnostic/challenge sample first.
CPU/OpenCV local correction prototype comes before VPI/MMAPI integration.
Any output is diagnostic until human review and metrics support it.
Do not claim mesh/local-warp EIS is solved.

task_queue.title: Control-plane contract
task_queue.objective: Register this local-warp quality bridge loop.

task_queue.title: Boundary sample selection
task_queue.objective: Choose one primary global-model-risk or Parallax sample and one backup sample.
success_criteria: sample is justified by scene-gate or metadata evidence

task_queue.title: Local problem definition
task_queue.objective: Measure or visualize the local residual issue before applying local Remap.
success_criteria: target region or grid is selected
baseline local residual or block motion is recorded
problem is not assumed from visual impression alone

task_queue.title: Local correction map
task_queue.objective: Construct a constrained local dx/dy correction map with smooth falloff and FOV safety.

task_queue.title: CPU OpenCV Remap prototype
task_queue.objective: Apply the correction map with OpenCV remap and evaluate local residual/visual side effects.
success_criteria: local metric improves or failure is clear

task_queue.title: VPI C++ Remap reproduction
task_queue.objective: If CPU prototype is useful, reproduce the map with VPI C++ Remap as a module-level check.

task_queue.title: Remap-MMAPI diagnostic
task_queue.objective: If VPI module is useful, run a diagnostic MMAPI scratch-stage Remap with the correction map.

task_queue.title: Review video
task_queue.objective: Create source / global baseline / local CPU / local VPI-or-MMAPI side-by-side evidence.
success_criteria: review copy is in the categorized tree

task_queue.title: Local quality metrics
task_queue.objective: Measure local residual, black border, and frame-diff sanity for the target region.
success_criteria: metric is tied to the chosen local issue
visual and metric conclusions agree or mismatch is explained

task_queue.title: Benefit classification
task_queue.objective: Classify the route as useful, useful-but-artifact-prone, not useful, or blocked.

task_queue.title: Knowledge recovery if blocked
task_queue.objective: Use local knowledge, public references, or internal-AI prompt if map design cannot be justified.
success_criteria: prompt is provided only if needed

task_queue.title: Documentation sync
task_queue.objective: Update measured result and claim boundary in docs.
success_criteria: Remap operator result is not inflated

task_queue.title: Long-term context maintenance
task_queue.objective: Record concise result and next boundary in the long-term context.

task_queue.title: Final validation
task_queue.objective: Run control-plane and git hygiene checks.

task_queue.title: Commit readiness
task_queue.objective: Prepare optional commit scope without committing unless requested.
success_criteria: large artifacts and secrets remain untracked

stop_reasons: no measurable local residual exists on chosen sample
local correction worsens visual quality or creates unacceptable artifacts
map design requires unverified industrial knowledge after local/public search
VPI/MMAPI integration would require broad rewrite before CPU proof
